source:
import { useLoans } from '../hooks/useLoans'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; export function EmprestimosPage() { const { loans, loading, error, fetchActiveLoans, returnBook } = useLoans(); const [filter, setFilter] = useState<'ALL' | 'ACTIVE' | 'OVERDUE'>('ALL'); useEffect(() => { fetchActiveLoans(); }, [fetchActiveLoans]); const handleReturn = async (id: string) => { if (window.confirm('Confirmar devolução do livro?')) { await returnBook(id); } }; const filteredLoans = loans.filter(loan => { if (filter === 'ACTIVE') return loan.status === 'ACTIVE'; if (filter === 'OVERDUE') return loan.status === 'OVERDUE'; return true; }); const activeCount = loans.filter(l => l.status === 'ACTIVE').length; const overdueCount = loans.filter(l => l.status === 'OVERDUE').length; return (

Empréstimos 🤝

Controle de livros emprestados e devoluções

➕ Registrar Empréstimo
{/* MINI STATS */}
📖
{activeCount + overdueCount}
Empréstimos Ativos
⏳
0
Vencem Hoje
⚠️
{overdueCount}
Em Atraso
🔍
{loading ? ( Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => ( )) ) : filteredLoans.length > 0 ? ( filteredLoans.map((loan) => ( )) ) : ( )}
Livro Usuário Empréstimo Devolução Status Ações
📖
{loan.book?.title}
{loan.user?.name?.substring(0, 2).toUpperCase() || '??'}
{loan.user?.name}
{new Date(loan.loanDate).toLocaleDateString()}
{new Date(loan.dueDate).toLocaleDateString()} {loan.lateDays > 0 && ({loan.lateDays}d)}
● {loan.status === 'OVERDUE' ? 'Atrasado' : 'Ativo'}
Nenhum empréstimo encontrado.
); }
